candidates.why: Clearly labeled top-line revenues on income statement with large positive values; Deferred Revenue - Current is a liability, not revenue.
Represents contract liability, not revenue; included only as candidate list item but not conceptually correct for REVT.

variables.notes: Use income statement Revenues as the sole revenue line; Deferred Revenue - Current is not revenue.

candidates.why: Income statement production/input cost line that matches cost of goods sold concept; numeric pattern aligns with major expense category.
Inventory component on balance sheet, not a flow expense; not appropriate for COGS.

variables.notes: Material cost is the direct production cost; Raw Materials is an inventory asset and not selected.

candidates.why: Broad subtotal likely aggregating COGS and SG&A; includes material cost so too wide for pure SG&A per instructions.
Classic SG&A-type overhead bucket excluding COGS; appropriate SG&A component.
Personnel/employee cost line typically treated as SG&A overhead (non-production portion) when no explicit SG&A exists; fits SG&A component definition.
Appears to be a liability/accrual on balance sheet, not an expense line; not appropriate for SG&A expense mapping.

variables.notes: Follow rule (c): no explicit SG&A line, so select overhead buckets. Exclude Operating expenses subtotal (too broad) and balance sheet Salary (not P&L).

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Represents amortization of previously capitalized R&D; relevant but secondary to the direct R&D expense line for XRD.
Explicit R&D expense line on income statement; best primary match for XRD.
Capitalized development costs asset, not an expense; not appropriate as XRD flow.
Balancing entry related to development cost asset; not an expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental

variables.notes: Provide a priority list: direct R&D expense first, and amortization of capitalized R&D as secondary source if the main line is missing for some years.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense from liabilities at amortised cost
candidates.why: Core interest expense line on income statement with negative values; best primary match for XINT.
Explicitly excludes interest (“non Interest”); should not be used for XINT.
Interest expense component related to lease liabilities; valid secondary interest expense line.
Represents minority interest share of net income, not an interest expense.
Same as Non-controlling interest; equity attribution, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Part of equity/comprehensive income attribution, not an interest cost.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease-related interest expense; good tertiary match for XINT.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; not suitable for XINT.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; not suitable for XINT.
Equity stake, not interest expense.
Equity stake, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expense from liabilities at amortised cost
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list of genuine interest expense lines; non-interest financial expenses, equity attributions, and loan balances are excluded.

candidates.why: Represents net income attributable to equity holders, not the stock of equity; not appropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Equity holder of the parent
candidates.why: Flow measure of comprehensive income, not a balance sheet equity amount.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent
candidates.why: Balance sheet shareholders’ equity (book equity) attributed to parent owners; best match for BE.
Total equity including non-controlling interests; acceptable secondary if owner’s equity line unavailable.
Technical balancing row, not the primary reported equity figure.
Balancing row, not the main equity metric.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row for total assets vs. liabilities+equity; not a pure equity figure.
Represents total assets/total financing, not equity alone.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the parent

variables.notes: Use shareholders’ equity attributable to owners as primary BE; Total Equity kept as secondary in case presentation changes.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit, not the balance sheet minority equity; less suitable than BS line for MIB which needs stock of minority interest.
Same as above, an income allocation; not ideal for MIB stock value.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Non-controlling interests
candidates.why: Flow of comprehensive income; not the balance sheet minority equity amount needed for MIB.
Balance sheet line for minority shareholders’ equity; primary match for MIB.
Alternate label for same concept; good secondary choice if primary label missing in some years.

variables.notes: Use balance sheet minority equity lines (Non-controlling interest / Minority Interest) as MIB, with a priority ordering for label changes across years.
